flagDemo: DEMONSTRATION of the gated flow — reviewer roles are illustrative role-holders, not a claim that named humans reviewed real spans. Provenance is grounded in REAL public standards; the numeric TGA/DSC values in dataset_001 remain reference-class until true instrument data. A real P0.1 replaces this request with a human-verified one (real spans, real reviewers).

rawSource.title: Contribution to fire resistance of structural members — applied reactive (intumescent) protection; standard fire curve

provenanceReview.note: standard designation verified; exact edition confirmed at ingestion (human-in-the-loop)

proposedCase.claimedMechanism: APP releases polyphosphoric acid on heating, which esterifies the char former and forms an intumescent char
antiConditions: binder decomposition onset below APP activation temperature

citationAnchors.quote: assessment of reactive (intumescent) protection that chars and expands to insulate under the standard fire exposure
temperature/time exposure under the standard fire curve producing char development
intumescent char formation from the reactive coating
protection performance is conditional on the reactive system activating within the exposure envelope

mbmMapping.note: maps to the existing app:solid → app:char route
